case_title: RYAN COOP VS. IMPERIAL CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOP, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT IMPERIAL CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOP, RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IMPERIAL CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $9,931.49 PRINCIPAL, $50.28 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,206.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
